entries.name: role of being consumer safety officer
entries.description: the role of a human being that is realized by enforcing regulations to ensure consumer safety

entries.name: fluorescent reporter intensity
entries.description: A measurement datum that represents the output of a scanner measuring the intensity value for each fluorescent reporter.

entries.name: regulator role
entries.description: a regulatory role involved with making and/or enforcing relevant legislation and governmental orders

entries.name: biological feature identification objective
entries.description: Biological_feature_identification_objective is an objective role carried out by the proposition defining the aim of a study designed to examine or characterize a particular biological feature.

entries.name: regulation-assigned role
entries.description: Regulation-assigned role is a regulatory role defined by legislation or governmental orders

entries.name: regulatory role
entries.description: a role which inheres in material entities and is realized in the processes of making, enforcing or being defined by legislation or orders issued by a governmental body.

entries.name: material supplier role
entries.description: a role realized through the process of supplying materials such as animal subjects, reagents or other materials used in an investigation.

entries.name: contract research organization role
entries.description: a worker role of carrying out the study according to the protocol document or study plan delivered by the PI, under the control of the study director.  This role cannot make decisions about the study execution

entries.name: list-mode data file
entries.description: A list-mode data file is a binary digital entity where events are stored sequentially, parameter by parameter.

entries.name: classified data set
entries.description: A data set that is produced as the output of a class prediction data transformation and consists of a data set with assigned class labels.

entries.name: reference substance role
entries.description: a role inhering in a material entity that is realized when  characteristics or responses elicited by the substance are used for comparison or reference.

entries.name: cytological stain role
entries.description: A dye role that is realized when the stain is used to colour cells and or cellular components for the purposes of visualization

entries.name: centrifuge pellet role
entries.description: pellet role is a role which inheres in a material entity and is realized by a material separation process using gravitational force generated by a centrifuge in which the material bearing the pellet role is the heavier or heaviest component of the output material..

entries.name: clinical research coordinator role
entries.description: a worker role comprised of handling the administrative duties of a trial or study.

entries.name: supernatant role
entries.description: supernatant role is a role which inheres in a material entity and is realized by a material separation process using gravitational force in which the material bearing the supernatant role is the liquid component of the output material.

entries.name: chromatography column
entries.description: Chromatography column in chemistry is a tube and contents (typically glass) used to purify individual chemical compounds from mixtures of compounds. It is often used for preparative applications on scales from micrograms up to kilograms.

entries.name: drug role
entries.description: a role borne by a molecular entity and is realized in a process of absorption by an organism  alters, or effects  (or is assumed to effect) a function(s) which inhere in an organism

entries.name: pump valve switch
entries.description: A pump valve switch is a cardinal part of a liquid chromatography instrument that controls the flow.

entries.name: xenotransplantation
entries.description: is the transplantation of living cells, tissues or \norgans from one species to another such as from pigs to humans

entries.name: physical document
entries.description: A physical document is an object serving as a record of information by means of symbolic marks.

entries.name: waiting
entries.description: A planned process where an agent does not take any new actions towards a particular objective for a period of time until a set of conditions is met.

entries.name: chromatography device
entries.description: A device that facilitates the separation of mixtures. The function of a chromatography device involves passing a mixture dissolved in a "mobile phase" through a stationary phase, which separates the analyte to be measured from other molecules in the mixture and allows it to be isolated.

entries.name: mass spectrometer
entries.description: A mass spectrometer is an instrument which is used to measure the mass to charge ratio of ions. All mass spectrometers consist of three basic parts: an ion source, a mass analyzer, and a detector system. The stages within the mass spectrometer are: 1. Production of ions from the sample 2. Separation of ions with different masses 3. Detection of the number of ions of each mass produced 4.Collection of data to generate the mass spectrum

entries.name: liquid chromatography mass spectrometry platform
entries.description: A liquid chromatography mass spectrometry platform is a platform that is the collection of instrument, software and reagents needed to perform a liquid chromatography mass spectrometry protocol. definition_source: OBI.

entries.name: microarray platform
entries.description: A microarray platform is a platform that contains the instruments, software and reagents needed to perform a microarray protocol. definition_source: OBI.

entries.name: ratio of collected to emitted light
entries.description: A measurement datum measuring the amount of light collected s compared to the total amount of emitted light in the detector component of a flow cytometer instrument. The datum has a qualitative role

entries.name: software optimization objective
entries.description: Software_optimization is a software_testing_objective role describing a study designed to identify the best software or parameters of the software.

entries.name: notified body role
entries.description: Notified body is regulator of consumables and medical devices charged by the Competent Authority with verifying compliance of medical devices (not drugs) with the applicable Essential Requirements stated in the Medical Device Directive

entries.name: allotransplantation
entries.description: is the transplantation of organs between members of the same species.

entries.name: gamma counter
entries.description: A processed material which measures gamma radiation

entries.name: trial monitor role
entries.description: a responsible party involved in planning, overseeing the conduct of a study or study component, and interpreting data from a study

entries.name: positive reference substance role
entries.description: a reference role in which the characteristics or responses elicited by the substance playing the reference substance role are used to establish a "100%" response

entries.name: polyethylene glycol p-(1,1,3,3-tetramethylbutyl)-phenyl ether
entries.description: triton X100 is a chemical entity which belongs to the group of The pluronics which are triblock copolymers of ethylene oxide and propylene oxide. Triton x-100 is_used_as detergent due to its non-ionic surfactant properties

entries.name: investigation
entries.description: a planned process that consists of parts: planning, study design execution, documentation and which produce conclusion(s).

entries.name: evaluant role
entries.description: a role that inheres in a material entity that is realized in an assay in which data is generated about the bearer of the evaluant role

entries.name: reporting party role
entries.description: a study personnel role played by a party who reports the outcome of a study component

entries.name: assay
entries.description: A planned process that has the objective to produce information about a material entity (the evaluant) by examining it.

entries.name: quantitative confidence value
entries.description: A data item which is used to indicate the degree of uncertainty about a measurement.

entries.name: sample preparation for assay
entries.description: A sample_preparation_for_assay is a protocol_application including material_enrollments and biomaterial_transformations. definition_source: OBI.

entries.name: diagnosis textual entity
entries.description: diagnosis is an assessment of a disease or injury, its likely prognosis and treatment.

entries.name: unplanned occurrence effecting an investigation
entries.description: a process which is external in origin to the investigation that has an impact on the outcome.

entries.name: eMedical record
entries.description: An eMedical record is a digital document derived from a computer system used primarily for patient care in a clinical setting.  Not required to be compliant with requirements of 21 CFR Part 11.

entries.name: culture medium
entries.description: a processed material that provides the needed nourishment for microorganisms or cells grown in vitro.

entries.name: electronic case report tabulation
entries.description: An electronic case report tabulation is a digital document containing tabular data about multiple trial participants which is part of a clinical regulatory submission.  An eCRT has the property that it can be audited and compliant with requirements of 21 CFR Part 11  and has format suited to review by regulators.

entries.name: polystyrene tube
entries.description: A polystyrene tube is a test tube made of polystyrene

entries.name: reagent role
entries.description: A role inhering in a biological or chemical entity that is intended to be applied in a scientific technique to participate (or have molecular components that participate) in a chemical reaction that facilitates the generation of data about some entity distinct from the bearer, or the generation of some specified material output distinct from the bearer.

entries.name: role of regulator of chemical manufacturer
entries.description: a regulator involved with making and enforcing legislation and governmental orders relevant to chemical manufacture

entries.name: detector reagent role
entries.description: a role which inheres in a molecular entity and is realized by the process of recording or registering a stimulus.

entries.name: role of certified IRB professional
entries.description: a role of which inheres in a Homo sapiens and realized during administration and oversight of the daily activities of Institutional Review Boards (IRBs) in the USA

entries.name: patient role
entries.description: a role which inheres in a person and is realized by the process of being under the care of a physician or health care provider

entries.name: protocol testing objective
entries.description: Protocol_testing_objective is a methodology_testing_objective role describing a study designed to examine the effects of using different protocols.

entries.name: participant under investigation role
entries.description: A role that is realized through the execution of a study design in which the bearer of the role participates and in which data about that bearer is collected.

entries.name: measured expression level
entries.description: A measurement datum that is the outcome of the quantification of an assay for the activity of a gene, or the number of RNA transcripts.

entries.name: responsible party role
entries.description: a study personnel role played by a party who is accountable for the execution of a study component and can make decisions about the conduct of the study

entries.name: principal investigator role
entries.description: a responsible party role played by a person responsible for the overall conduct of a study

entries.name: transplantation
entries.description: a protocol application to replace an organ or tissue of an organism

entries.name: pH indicator dye role
entries.description: the role of a dye that is realized when the dye is used in an experiment to measure the pH in a material entity

entries.name: specimen role
entries.description: A role borne by a material entity that is obtained during a specimen collection process and that can be realized by performing measurements or observations on the specimen.

entries.name: sequence feature identification objective
entries.description: Sequence_feature_identification_objective is a biological_feature_identification_objective role describing a study designed to examine or characterize molecular features exhibited at the level of a macromolecular sequence, e.g. nucleic acid, protein, polysaccharide.

entries.name: intervention design
entries.description: An intervention design is a study design in which a controlled process applied to the subjects (the intervention) serves as the independent variable manipulated by the experimentalist. The treatment (perturbation or intervention) defined can be defined as a combination of values taken by independent variable manipulated by the experimentalists are applied to the recruited subjects assigned (possibly by applying specific methods) to treatment groups. The specificity of intervention design is the fact that independent variables are being manipulated and a response of the biological system is evaluated via response variables as monitored by possibly a series of assays.

entries.name: worker role
entries.description: a personnel role played by a party who executes a component of the study plan; this can occur before, during, after or outside the study timeline

entries.name: Bernoulli trial
entries.description: An assay where the output data is a datum with one of two values denoting success and failure.

entries.name: gene list
entries.description: A data set of the names or identifiers of genes that are the outcome of an analysis or have been put together for the purpose of an analysis.

entries.name: number of particles in subset
entries.description: A measurement datum measuring the number of subjects in a defined subset in a flow cytometer instrument. The datum has a qualitative role

entries.name: number of lost events electronic
entries.description: A measurement datum measuring the number of analysis events lost due to errors in data acquisition electronic coincidence in a flow cytometer instrument. The datum has a qualitative role.

entries.name: calibration substance role
entries.description: A reference substance role that is realized when characteristics or responses elicited by the bearer are used to ensure an instrument is within protocol specification of accuracy or performance

entries.name: molecular feature identification objective
entries.description: Molecular_feature_identification_objective is a biological_feature_identification_objective role describing a study designed to examine or characterize molecular features of a biological system, e.g. expression profiling, copy number of molecular components, epigenetic modifications.

entries.name: hardware testing objective
entries.description: Hardware_testing_objective is a methodology_testing_objective role describing a study designed to examine the effects of using different hardware, e.g. scanner.

entries.name: incubator
entries.description: A device in which environmental conditions (light, photoperiod, temperature, humidity, etc.) can be controlled

entries.name: baseline participant role
entries.description: a reference participant role which is realized by making the reference to qualities at the start of the study or intervention

entries.name: role of independent data monitoring committee
entries.description: a trial monitor role charged recommending whether to continue, modify, or end the trial

entries.name: pathologist role
entries.description: a worker role of being responsible for making the histopathology diagnoses associated with data from a study; this activity occurs outside the study timeline

entries.name: supernatant collection system harvesting frame
entries.description: A device that is designed for collecting 90% of the supernatant in a microplate well and separating the living cell with no stress, eliminating centrifugation and other similar techniques. It can be used in a variety of release assays with different radioactive isotopes, such as Cr51 or I125.

entries.name: filter paper
entries.description: A device manufacture with the intent to provide a porous unsized paper used for filtering.

entries.name: cell co-culturing
entries.description: A material combination in which cell cultures of two or more different types are are combined and allowed to culture as one.

entries.name: role of Institutional Review Board
entries.description: the role of a organization that is realized by members reviewing study designs for their agreement with regulations

entries.name: eSource document
entries.description: an eSource document is a digital document consisting of a logical collection of Source data and other eSource documents that can be presented in an ordered way and capture the time of completion, change, and any signatures

entries.name: crossover population role
entries.description: a role realized when a participant serves as reference to itself

entries.name: complete nutrient role
entries.description: A nutrient role that inheres in a material entity and is realized in the use of that material entity by an organism to provide all needed nourishment.

entries.name: radiolabel role
entries.description: a molecular label role which inheres in a material entity which is realized by the process of radioactivity detection

entries.name: clonal cDNA library
entries.description:
Mixed population of cDNAs (complementaryDNA) made from mRNA from a defined source, usually a specific cell type. This term should be associated only to nucleic acid interactors not to their proteins product. For instance in 2h screening use living cells (MI:0349) as sample process.

ALT DEF (PRS):: a cDNA library is a collection of host cells, typically E.Coli cells but not exclusively. modified by transfer of plasmid DNA molecule used as vector containing a fragment or totality of cDNA molecule (the insert) .  cDNA library may have an array of role and applications.

entries.name: electronic case report form
entries.description: An electronic case report form is a digital document used to record all of the protocol required information to be reported for each trial subject. An eCRF has the property that it can be audited and compliant with requirements of 21 CFR Part 11.

entries.name: placebo role
entries.description: a negative reference substance is a reference role in which the substance playing the reference substance role is physically similar in appearance to the test substance

entries.name: autotransplantation
entries.description: is the transplantation of tissue from one part of \nthe body to another in the same individual. )

entries.name: parameter threshold
entries.description: A measurement datum measuring the minimal signal that must be detected to generate an electrical event, as compared to the maximal detected signal in a flow cytometer instrument. The datum has a qualitative role

entries.name: study group role
entries.description: a study population role where the bearer is a population of material entities and the role is realized in the implementation of a study design wherein the entities bearing the study population role are observed or subjected to intervention according to the study design and are biological replicates, i.e. they receive the same treatment under the protocol

entries.name: p-value
entries.description: A quantitative confidence value that represents the probability of obtaining a result at least as extreme as that actually obtained, assuming that the actual value was the result of chance alone.

entries.name: population
entries.description: a population is a collection of individuals from the same taxonomic class living, counted or sampled at a particular site or in a particular area

entries.name: NMR 3D molecular structure determination assay
entries.description: A 3D molecular structure determination assay that uses magnetic properties of atomic nuclei to determine the 3D structure and dynamics of molecules in the input sample.

entries.name: imaging assay
entries.description: An assay that produces a picture of an entity.

entries.name: protocol optimization objective
entries.description: Protocol_optimization is a protocol_testing_objective role describing a study designed to identify the best protocol.  This may be carried out by comparing different protocols or by modifying the parameters used within a single protocol.

entries.name: role of pathology review board
entries.description: a worker role comprised of providing a confirmed and consensus diagnosis for histopathology results obtained during the investigation

entries.name: microtiter plate
entries.description: A microtiter_plate is a flat plate with multiple wells used as small test tubes.

entries.name: role of impartial witness
entries.description: a role which inheres in a Homo sapiens and is realized during a clinical trial - the impartial witness is independent of the trial and cannot be unfairly influenced by people involved with the trial

entries.name: chromatin immunoprecipitation
entries.description: An immunoprecipitation in which chromatin (i.e. packaged DNA which can include protein and RNA complexes) is cut into short regions, reversibly cross linked, and antibodies or tags are used to select for pieces of chromatin with desired characteristics.

entries.name: biological replicate role
entries.description: a reference participant role realized by equivalent treatment of participants

entries.name: radioactivity detection
entries.description: An assay that measures the amount of radiation in the radioactive spectrum (alpha, beta or gamma rays) emitted from an input material.

entries.name: investigation agent role
entries.description: A role borne by an entity and that is realized in a process that is part of an investigation in which an objective is achieved. These processes include, among others: planning, overseeing, funding, reviewing.

entries.name: nutrient role
entries.description: a role that inheres in a material entity and is realized in the use of that material entity by an organism when it is used in that organism's metabolism and provides nourishment.

entries.name: methodology testing objective
entries.description: Methodology_testing_objective is an objective role carried out by a proposition defining the aim of the study is to examine the effect of using different methodologies.
